articles.title: Raghav Chadha's subtle response after AAP replaces him as Rajya Sabha deputy leader
articles.description: Raghav Chadha had often made headlines for raising issues concerning common masses and his Parliament address videos have often gone viral.

articles.title: 43% of the trees transplanted for Central Vista are dead, LS told
articles.description: 43% of trees transplanted for the  ₹20,000 crore Central Vista project have died, with 1,545 out of 3,609 perishing, according to the Lok Sabha.

articles.title: Central Vista project records 43% loss in transplanted trees
articles.description: The government said a total of 3,609 trees were transplanted for the project, of which 1,545 did not survive after transplantation.

articles.title: Artemis II Astronauts Rocket Toward The Moon After Spending A Day Around Earth
articles.description: NASA's Artemis II astronauts fired their engines and blazed toward the moon Thursday night, breaking free of the chains that have trapped humanity in shallow laps around Earth in the decades since...

articles.title: Russia offers to supply more oil and natural gas to India in bilateral talks
articles.description: Russia offered more oil and gas to India as Deputy PM Denis Manturov met Narendra Modi for bilateral talks in New Delhi to boost trade and energy ties.

topStories.title: Who is General Randy George? US Army Chief of Staff sacked by Pete Hegseth as war with Iran drags on
topStories.description: During his military career, Randy George served multiple tours in Iraq and Afghanistan, including deploying for the 101st Airborne Division during Operation Desert Storm. George also commanded the 4th Brigade Combat Team during the war in Afghanistan.

dailyNews.title: Pam Bondi fired by Trump- From POTUS' Attorney General pick to ouster – timeline of how she rose to prominence
dailyNews.description: Pam Bondi – a Trump loyalist, who oversaw Justice Department upheaval – is the first woman who has served as Florida's Attorney General. Trump, in his Truth Social post, described her as a ‘Great American Patriot and a loyal friend’

dailyNews.description: While it remains unclear how long Todd Blanche will stay in the job, whoever ends up taking over permanently will lead a department that he has shaped in his own image.

dailyNews.description: President Trump has been talking about the emergency facility beneath what was once the East Wing, details of which are usually kept secret, as he tries to justify his renovation.
